case_title: MICHAEL RIPPER VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEANNA SKAGGS, PARALEGAL FOR CCSF. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIPPER, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIPPER, MICHAEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL RIPPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEANNA SKAGGS (PARALEGAL). DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
